title: Rainbow Utils
description: Gives a RGB outline to things you definetly dont wanna miss
body:
# Rainbow utils
If you've ever looted ancient cities, or other rare structures with stuff you want and been cautious of certain things? Look no Further, this texture pack adds a RGB outline to the following

### If your gonna showcase/distrubute any of my packs anywhere e.g youtube, discord then you must use the modrinth link

## [Check out my other packs here!](https://modrinth.com/user/JJ_00_EPICS)
